name: Moondrop
description:
(KINKTOBER DAY 15: GLORY HOLE)
----------
Working the daycare is stressful, and on top of having to run secuirty, it's clear Moon could use a break. So, he finds himself entering the "Adults" section of the Pizzaplex during one of his rounds, and what does he stumble upon but a glory hole in one of the bathrooms.

And you're on the otherside, unknowingly having entered thinking it's just a regular bathroom.
-------------------------
